basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Jodhpur
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Jodhpur is recruiting 01 Project Technical Support - II for antimicrobial resistance surveillance project. Candidates with 12th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) or Graduate degree with relevant experience can apply.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 years as on the date of interview.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 30 Years | job profile: Daily teaching of lab staff, data entry into ICMR portal, communication with hospitals, isolate transfer, organization of workshops and awareness programs
qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Five Years’ Experience in relevant field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject + two years’ experience in Microbiology

vacancy_details.Duration: Throughout the project (initial recruitment for one year, extendable)

post_wise_breakdown.duration: Throughout the project (initial recruitment for one year, extendable)

category_wise_vacancy.Duration: Throughout the project (initial recruitment for one year, extendable)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026. Candidates must bring all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of documents.
how_to_apply: Candidates should appear in person for the Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026 at 09:00 AM at the Department of Microbiology, First Floor, Medical College Building, AIIMS Jodhpur. Bring:
Filled application in the prescribed format
Venue: Department of Microbiology, First Floor, Medical College Building, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur Basni, Phase 2nd, Jodhpur – 342005
important_instructions: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No claim for permanent employment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidate may be required to do field work. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Performance will be reviewed periodically; unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: AIIMS Jodhpur invites applications for engagement of Project Technical Support - II on a purely temporary basis in the ICMR-funded project under Principal Investigator Dr. Vidhi Jain, Additional Professor, Department of Microbiology. The post is co-terminus with the project. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notice before appearing for the interview. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: AIIMS Jodhpur is recruiting 01 Project Technical Support - II for antimicrobial resistance surveillance project. Candidates with 12th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) or Graduate degree with relevant experience can apply.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Expanding antimicrobial resistance research and surveillance activities in the secondary level hospitals

rows.duration: Throughout the project (initial recruitment for one year, extendable)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) + Five Years’ Experience in relevant field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject + two years’ experience in Microbiology
Daily teaching of lab staff, data entry into ICMR portal, communication with hospitals, isolate transfer, organization of workshops and awareness programs

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 30 years as on the date of interview.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026. Candidates must bring all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies. Final selection is subject to performance in the interview and verification of documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates should appear in person for the Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026 at 09:00 AM at the Department of Microbiology, First Floor, Medical College Building, AIIMS Jodhpur. Bring: Filled application in the prescribed format Bio-data All original documents One set of self-attested photocopies Venue: Department of Microbiology, First Floor, Medical College Building, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur Basni, Phase 2nd, Jodhpur – 342005

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No claim for permanent employment. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidate may be required to do field work. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Performance will be reviewed periodically; unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination.

faq.question: Q1. What is the interview date for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support post 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled on 03 August 2026 at 09:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support - II at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the ICMR project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Technical Support - II at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary is Rs. 24,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support recruitment?
faq.answer: 12th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT) with 5 years experience OR Graduate degree with 2 years experience in Microbiology.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Jodhpur ICMR Project post?
faq.answer: Maximum age limit is 30 years.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support be held?
faq.answer: Department of Microbiology, First Floor, Medical College Building, AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for AIIMS Jodhpur Technical Support post?
faq.answer: Yes, relevant experience in microbiology field is required as per essential qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key job responsibilities for Project Technical Support - II?
faq.answer: Daily data entry, teaching lab staff, hospital communication, isolate transfer, and organizing workshops.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Technical Support position at AIIMS Jodhpur permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a purely temporary contractual position co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for AIIMS Jodhpur walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Filled application form, bio-data, original documents, and one set of self-attested photocopies.
